name: CENTURY CASINOS INC /CO/
summary: Century Casinos Inc. is a casino entertainment company that owns and operates casino properties. The company is engaged in gaming operations and manages multiple casino facilities. The filing references a Master Lease and credit agreement with Goldman, suggesting real estate-leased casino operations. The company conducts a strategic review process and has casinos with plans extending into 2026 and beyond.

products.name: Casino Operations
products.description: Ownership and operation of casino gaming facilities across multiple locations.

partnerships.description: Credit agreement with Goldman supporting company financing obligations.
